Useful words

  • 英魂 えいこん · eikon departed spirit
  • 人魂 ひとだま · hitodama floating ball of fire (said to be the soul of a dead person)

Example sentences

  • 魂を見ます。I look at the kanji 魂.

Interface contexts

Flash Kanji note

What to watch

Learn 魂 through words first, then reinforce it in sentence and stroke-order practice.
